title: mfine Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: mfine Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the mfine Global Group family as a Full Stack Developer in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About mfine Global Group:
mfine Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine Global Group!
